channel.title: SQL Injection on bubka hacks stuff
channel.description: Recent content in SQL Injection on bubka hacks stuff

item.title: LD-SQLi Detected
item.description: An external IP hosted on DigitalOcean performed a manual SQL injection reconnaissance against an internal web server, cycling through classic SQLi payloads. All requests returned HTTP 500, confirming the attack did not succeed.

item.title: Wazuh + Suricata: injection detection
item.description: Detected a SQL Injection attack, observed 85 alerts across 6 rule IDs, and configured automated IP blocking via active response.
